016package org.consensusj.bitcoinj.dsl.js;
017
018import org.bitcoinj.base.BitcoinNetwork;
019import org.consensusj.bitcoin.jsonrpc.BitcoinExtendedClient;
020import org.consensusj.bitcoin.jsonrpc.RpcConfig;
021import org.consensusj.bitcoin.jsonrpc.RpcURI;
022import org.consensusj.bitcoin.jsonrpc.test.TestServers;
023import org.consensusj.bitcoin.jsonrpc.test.RegTestEnvironment;
024import org.consensusj.bitcoin.jsonrpc.test.RegTestFundingSource;
025import org.consensusj.jsonrpc.AsyncSupport;
026import org.openjdk.nashorn.api.scripting.NashornScriptEngineFactory;
027import org.bitcoinj.base.Coin;
028import org.slf4j.Logger;
029import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;
030
031import javax.script.ScriptEngine;
032import javax.script.ScriptException;
033import java.io.File;
034import java.io.FileInputStream;
035import java.io.FileNotFoundException;
036import java.io.InputStreamReader;
037import java.nio.charset.StandardCharsets;
038import java.util.function.BiFunction;
039import java.util.function.Function;
040
041
042/**
043 * ScriptRunner that places a JSON-RPC client and Bitcoin utility functions inside
044 * a script context so they can be called from JavaScript (currently Nashorn, but in
045 * the future this may be Graal Javascript)
046 */
047public class ScriptRunner {
048    private static final Logger log = LoggerFactory.getLogger(ScriptRunner.class);
049    private final ScriptEngine engine;
050
051    public ScriptRunner(RpcConfig rpcConfig) {
052        engine = new NashornScriptEngineFactory().getScriptEngine("-scripting");
053        var client = new BitcoinExtendedClient(rpcConfig);
054        var env = new RegTestEnvironment(client);
055        var funder = new RegTestFundingSource(client);
056        engine.put("client", client);
057        engine.put("env", env);
058        engine.put("funder", funder);
059        engine.put("satoshi", (Function<Number, Coin>) satoshis -> Coin.valueOf(satoshis.longValue()));
060        engine.put("btc", (Function<Number, Coin>) btc -> Coin.valueOf(btc.longValue() * Coin.COIN.longValue()));
061        engine.put("coin", (BiFunction<Number, Number, Coin>) (btc, cents) -> Coin.valueOf(btc.intValue(), cents.intValue()));
062        engine.put("getBlockCount", (AsyncSupport.ThrowingSupplier<Integer>) client::getBlockCount);
063    }
064
065    public ScriptRunner() {
066        this(new RpcConfig(BitcoinNetwork.MAINNET, RpcURI.getDefaultMainNetURI(),
067                TestServers.getInstance().getRpcTestUser(), TestServers.getInstance().getRpcTestPassword()));
068    }
069
070    public Object evalResource(String resourcePath) throws ScriptException {
071        log.info("Running resource: {}", resourcePath);
072        var reader = new InputStreamReader(getClass().getResourceAsStream(resourcePath), StandardCharsets.UTF_8);
073        return engine.eval(reader);
074    }
075
076    public Object evalFile(File scriptFile) throws ScriptException, FileNotFoundException {
077        log.info("Running file: {}", scriptFile);
078        var reader = new InputStreamReader(new FileInputStream(scriptFile), StandardCharsets.UTF_8);
079        return engine.eval(reader);
080    }
081}
